---
title: "Boreal Birds Dashboard Documentation"
subtitle: "Boreal Avian Modelling Center (BAM)"
page-layout: full
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub Repository
      href: https://github.com/UBC-MDS/Boreal-Birds
---

Welcome to the documentation for the **Boreal Birds Dashboard**.

---

## Quick Start Guide

### Prerequisites
Ensure you have the required package manager installed (Conda/Mamba is highly recommended). Dependencies are specified in the root `environment.yml` and `app/requirements.txt` files.

### Development Setup

1. **Clone the repository and enter the workspace:**
```bash
git clone https://github.com/UBC-MDS/Boreal-Birds.git
cd Boreal-Birds
```

2. **Create and activate the environment:**
```bash
conda env create -f environment.yml
conda activate bird
```

3. **Launch the interactive Shiny dashboard application locally:**
```bash
shiny run app/app.py --reload
```

### Update Documentation
```bash
make build-docs
```
